products.description: This sophisticated 4-Hook Wall Mounted Coat Rack brings timeless elegance to your home with its beautifully crafted teardrop-shaped hooks in a warm antique gold brass finish. The gracefully curved hooks provide a stylish and practical hanging solution for coats, towels, robes, bags, and accessories in entryways, bathrooms, and bedrooms. The smooth rounded backplate design sits flush against the wall, creating a refined finished appearance whilst reducing dust accumulation for easier maintenance. Constructed from heavy-duty metal with brass-tone plating, this wall hanger delivers reliable performance and lasting durability through years of daily use. Each rack measures 40 cm in length, 8 cm in height, and 5 cm in width, offering ample hanging space without overwhelming your wall. The brushed antique gold finish adds a luxurious vintage touch that enhances any interior décor style. This pack of 3 racks allows you to create a coordinated hook system throughout multiple rooms, perfect for matching bathroom sets and entryway arrangements. Pre-drilled mounting holes ensure straightforward, secure wall installation. Whether you're organising your hallway or adding functional style to your bedroom, these traditional teardrop hook rails combine classic decorative appeal with practical everyday functionality.

products.description:
This heavy-duty surface bolt door latch combines reliable security with timeless style. Crafted from durable aluminium with an elegant antique brass finish, this sliding door bolt lock adds both functionality and vintage charm to doors, windows, cabinets, and gates.

The wall-mounted design ensures secure installation and dependable performance while maintaining a refined decorative appearance. The set includes a strike plate and mounting screws, allowing for quick and straightforward installation.

Featuring a smooth sliding mechanism, the bolt glides effortlessly for convenient locking and unlocking, making it easy to secure your space quickly and reliably. Measuring 12.7 cm in length, this surface bolt provides strong and dependable protection for a wide range of applications around your home or property.

Ideal for exterior gates, interior doors, windows, and cabinets, this versatile latch offers both practicality and decorative appeal. The antique brass finish enhances corrosion resistance and durability, helping maintain its attractive appearance over time.

Designed with a precision-engineered sliding bolt and easy-grip knob, it ensures smooth operation and convenient everyday use while adding a classic touch to your home hardware.
products.name: Heavy Duty Aluminium Bolt Door Latch, Antique Brass Finish Sliding Door Bolt Lock with Strike Plate for Doors, Windows, Cabinets, Gates & Sheds

The six high-gloss rounded chrome hooks provide strong, reliable hanging points for coats, towels, robes, bags, keys, and accessories throughout your home or workplace. Measuring 40 centimetres in length, this versatile wall hanger is perfectly sized for hallways, bathrooms, kitchens, offices, and guest rooms. The chrome-plated finish resists corrosion, tarnishing, and moisture damage, making it ideal for high-humidity environments. Smooth surfaces wipe clean effortlessly with a damp cloth, ensuring the rack maintains its pristine appearance with minimal maintenance. Mounting holes positioned at both ends and the centre allow for secure, level installation on your wall. Weighing just 350 grammes, this durable stainless steel and chrome construction offers both strength and style. Available in packs of 1, 2, or 3 to maximise storage across multiple spaces, this contemporary hook rail is the perfect organisational solution for residential and commercial settings alike.

products.description: Transform your entryway or bedroom with this eye-catching vintage sports car shaped wall-mounted key holder in stunning shiny gold finish. Inspired by classic racing cars of the golden era, this decorative wall rack perfectly blends automotive artistry with everyday functionality. The life-like sculpted car body features detailed wheel rims, sleek bodywork, and a realistic silhouette that will delight car enthusiasts and home décor lovers alike. Equipped with 6 sturdy stainless steel hooks mounted beneath the car body, it offers ample hanging space for keys, keychains, small bags, lanyards, dog leashes, sunglasses, and more. Crafted from high-quality resin and metal, this wall hook is durable, lightweight, and easy to install on any wall using the included mounting hardware. Measuring 35 cm in length, 8 cm in height, and 7 cm in width, it weighs just 350 grammes. Whether as a functional organiser near your front door or as a statement piece in a garage or man cave, this sports car key holder makes a perfect gift for car lovers, homeowners, and décor enthusiasts during housewarmings, birthdays, and festive occasions.
